meta.title: LightShow Studio — Create Spectacular Tesla Light Shows
meta.description: Create, synchronize and export Tesla light shows directly from your iPhone. Interactive 3D model, audio timeline, AI generation and native .fseq export. Compatible with Model 3 and Model Y.
meta.ogDescription: The iOS app to create Tesla light shows with an interactive 3D model, audio timeline and AI generation. Native .fseq export, compatible with Model 3/Y.
meta.twitterTitle: LightShow Studio — Tesla Light Shows from your iPhone
meta.twitterDescription: 3D model, audio timeline, generative AI and .fseq export. Create the perfect light show for your Tesla.

hero.subtitle: The professional tool to design, synchronize and control your light shows. Simple. Powerful. Intuitive.

features.label: Features
features.subtitle: From 3D modeling to Tesla export, including AI generation: every detail has been designed for a smooth and intuitive experience.

groups.title: Light Show Creation
groups.description: Individually control 21 elements: headlights, turn signals, windows, mirrors, trunk and charge port. Directly on an interactive 3D model.
subFeatures: Accurate 3D model with touch rotation, zoom and tap selection
Headlights, turn signals, repeaters, brake lights, fog lights and license plate
Animated windows (window dance), foldable mirrors, trunk and charge port
Charge port with rainbow LED
Dedicated colors and visual indicators per part
Haptic feedback on placement and selection
Model 3/Y available — Model S and SUV coming soon

groups.title: Audio & Timeline
groups.description: Import your music or pick from the built-in library. Place and adjust your events on a waveform-synced timeline.
subFeatures: Built-in music library with pre-computed waveform
MP3 import from phone (max 5 min) with automatic audio analysis
Visual timeline with color coding by part type
Place by tap, drag & drop with long press, delete events
Synchronized audio + real-time 3D animation playback
Variable playback speed: 0.5x to 2x
Adjustable vertical zoom (100% to 200%)

groups.title: Effects & Options
groups.description: Customize each event: solid or blink effect, intensity, fades, duration and special modes for trunk, windows, mirrors and charge port.
subFeatures: Solid (continuous) and Blink (3 speeds: 1x, 2x, 3x) effects
Adjustable power from 0 to 100%
Ease In / Ease Out: progressive fades
Customizable duration in seconds
Mirrors: close, open, back and forth
Windows: window dance (oscillation)
Trunk: open (13s), close (4s), dance (5s)
Charge port: open, close, rainbow LED
Command counter respecting vehicle hardware limits

groups.title: AI Generation
groups.description: AI analyzes your music and generates a complete synchronized light show. Describe the desired style or choose a preset.
subFeatures: Complete automatic generation synchronized to audio
Custom prompt (max 500 characters) to describe your vision
Presets: Fireworks, Wave, Party, Spooky, Romantic, Aggressive
Progress animation on the 3D model during generation
Confirmation before replacing existing events

groups.title: Project Management
groups.description: Automatic save, duplication, undo/redo up to 50 levels.
subFeatures: Auto-save every 1.5 seconds
Project list with name, music, events and date
Duplicate, delete and rename your shows
Undo / Redo — history up to 50 levels
Interactive tutorial on first launch (5 steps, skippable)

groups.title: Export & Share
groups.description: Export as .fseq (native Tesla format), share your creations with the community and follow the built-in tutorial to transfer everything to your vehicle.
subFeatures: .fseq export: native Tesla compatible format
Step-by-step export tutorial in 4 steps
MP3 export of the associated audio file
Community sharing via JSON (lightstudio_v1)
Import shows shared by other users
6 body colors, light mode, cursor offset
4 languages: French, English, Spanish, German

preview.label: Preview
preview.subtitle: A dark and clean interface, designed for mobile creation. Tap to enlarge.

contact.label: Contact
contact.subtitle: Early access, suggestion, bug, partnership or just saying hello :) we reply quickly.

download.label: Download
download.subtitle: Download LightShow Studio for free and start creating light shows for your Tesla.
download.appStoreAlt: Download on the App Store — Coming Soon
download.playStoreAlt: Get it on Google Play — Coming Soon
